caption:
Neon rain kissed my synthetic skin as I adjusted the holographic strap of my tactical bodysuit. 👠🌃 The humidity of Neo-Vegas clung to my curves, a tight, heat-hugging second skin that whispered secrets of the underground. I leaned against the flickering sign of the 'Gilded Chassis,' watching the silhouette of the target through the mist. My cybernetic implants hummed, syncing with the pulse of the city. 💓

They thought I was just a courtesan in the chrome district, a decoy for the data drop. But they didn't know my suit concealed the most dangerous weapon of all. The fabric stretched just enough to hint at the fire beneath, the fullness of my chest pressed against the hard polymer shell. Every step sent a jolt of static electricity up my spine, a reminder of the power I carried. 🔥

He turned the corner, eyes fixed on the shimmer of my coat. My heart hammered against the mesh, a second heartbeat in the dark. I didn't need a weapon; I just needed him to follow the scent of ozone and perfume. The chase was on, and tonight, I was the predator. 🐾

#CyberpunkVibes #NeonNights #SciFiErotica #UndergroundOp #FutureFashion #TechWarrior
